notes:
The game will run after some small tweaks. It normally fails to launch because it can not find the sots.gob file as it is looking for it in the user home directory. There are two solutions to this, first is to move, from the game folder, the stos.gob and the sots_local_en.gob(or the language that you have installed) to the user home directory. Second you can modify the sots.ini file(which is in the games base directory) and replace the two lines under [Modules] with
Mount1=Z:\home\<INSERT USER NAME>\.local\share\Steam\steamapps\common\Sword of the Stars Complete Collection\sots_local_en.gob
Mount2=Z:\home\<INSERT USER NAME>\.local\share\Steam\steamapps\common\Sword of the Stars Complete Collection\sots.gob
Be sure to change <INSERT USER NAME> to your current user name. If you have installed the game to a different directory, make sure to change the two lines to reflect the location installed, the two lines above are the default install locations.
title: Sword of the Stars: Complete Collection

notes: Gives error saying "application error occurred", then creates a "Mars.dmp" file. I tried moving the two files suggested in previous post to the home directory, but still failed to launch.
